summary: Iter 14 backend split + SENDER_EMAIL switch fully verified. All 18 pytest cases pass (module imports, SENDER_EMAIL=levi@thirdrailsystems.ee, pilot/diagnostic intake, qualifier sanitisation, honeypot, fast-submit, per-IP 429 rate-limit, admin auth + list + filter + preview 404, public brief PDF + 404, briefing generate streams %PDF, email-to-lead test_bypass). Frontend regression: all 9 routes load 200 with 0 console errors; /catch-22 Download PDF hits /api/public/briefs/shadow-hr.pdf and returns 200; /admin login + table (20 rows, Pilot/Diagnostic badges) + BriefingDialog open + briefing-diagnostic-qualifiers panel renders org_scale/workforce/vendor correctly.

minor.issue: FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated — consider migrating to lifespan event handler. Non-blocking, runtime-safe.

critical_code_review_comments: Refactor is clean — 9 modules each <200 lines, single-responsibility, no circular imports.
load_dotenv ordering in server.py is correct (before any env-reading imports).
services/email.is_test_lead() correctly bypasses Resend for TEST_/example.* — confirmed via 14 test leads created, none hit Resend (email_status='test_bypass' on every response).
validation.py allowlists are frozenset (immutable, hashable) — correct choice.
Backwards-compat underscore aliases (_send_notification, _sanitize_qualifier, etc.) preserved — safe for any legacy callers.
Minor: @app.on_event('shutdown') deprecated by FastAPI; switch to lifespan handler in a future cleanup pass.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (9/9 routes + admin + briefing dialog + PDF download)

seed_data_creation: Test created ~14 TEST_-prefixed leads (TEST_Alice/TEST_Smith, TEST_AdminUI/TEST_Diag, TEST_Briefing/TEST_Lead) with @example.com emails. All hit synthetic-lead bypass — zero Resend sends. Safe to leave in DB or clear at main agent's discretion.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 14 refactor + SENDER_EMAIL=levi@thirdrailsystems.ee fully verified. Regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iter14_refactor.py covers all six endpoint families + import sanity. Use _ip() helper (198.51.100.0/24 random) to avoid per-IP limiter. ALWAYS use TEST_ prefix + @example.com to hit the bypass — verified via email_status='test_bypass' in 100% of intake/email-to-lead responses.
rca of the issue: No issues found. Refactor is behaviour-preserving and SENDER_EMAIL switch is live + correct.
